summary: End-to-end testing of CakApp (mobile-web super-app). Backend: 15/15 pytest tests passed covering settings, menu, tariff, auth, orders+wa.me URL, admin CRUD, and reports (daily/monthly). Frontend: home shows all 6 service tiles, Cakride form computes total correctly (5000 + 2500*5 = Rp 17.500), order button redirects to wa.me with encoded text, Cakfood cart works (2x Nasi Goreng = Rp 36.000), Cakpay shows 6 packages, Account language/theme toggles work (dark class applied), admin login at /admin/login works with admin/admin (wrong creds shows 'Invalid credentials' toast), admin dashboard shows daily/monthly stats, reports page renders 2 Recharts bar charts, tariff page lists 3 services, settings page shows the seeded WA number 6285233962821, bottom nav hidden on /admin routes and visible on user routes.
action_items: Minor: Settings page WhatsApp input is missing the documented data-testid='settings-whatsapp' attribute (the field renders and works correctly, but the testid is absent). Add it for easier future automated testing.

Minor: The review request referenced ride form testids like 'ride-name', 'ride-distance' but the implementation uses 'input-name', 'input-phone', 'input-pickup', 'input-destination', 'input-distance', 'input-notes'. Either update docs or rename testids for consistency.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth tokens are stored in an in-memory set (_active_tokens) — they will be wiped on backend restart, forcing admin re-login. Acceptable for MVP but consider JWT or DB-backed sessions for resilience.
Password is hardcoded plaintext 'admin' in server.py (line 92-93). Acceptable for stated requirement (admin/admin) but should be moved to env / hashed for any non-MVP usage.
POST /api/orders does not validate phone/name length or sanitize input — message text is fully user-controlled (used only in wa.me link, so risk is low).
PUT /api/admin/orders/{id}/status accepts 'status' as a query parameter rather than a JSON body — works but inconsistent with other update endpoints.
Reports endpoint compares ISO date strings lexicographically. Works because created_at is stored as RFC3339 UTC isoformat, but a real datetime field would be more robust.
Frontend: 'Failed' generic error message on RideForm submit failure — could surface backend error detail.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created beyond what app auto-seeds (settings, 3 tariffs, 6 food, 6 mart, 6 cakpay). Tests create and clean up TEST_ menu items and a single TEST_User order which remains in DB (1 record, low impact).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_cakapp.py and pass 15/15. RideForm uses input-* testids (not ride-*). CategoryPage uses add-{id}/sub-{id} testids. Admin login error renders as a Sonner toast (text 'Invalid credentials'). Bottom nav has data-testid='bottom-nav' and is correctly hidden on /admin/*.
